frameworks.amazon-bedrock-agentcore: GA with quality evaluations and policy controls

notes.google-adk: Now supports Python, TypeScript, Go, and Java; ADK 2.0 alpha available (not for production); Go SDK reached 1.0 GA
notes.semantic-kernel: Python and .NET documented; Handlebars/OpenAI planners deprecated; Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 is recommended for new multi-agent projects
notes.microsoft-agent-framework: GA 1.0 released April 3, 2026 — unifies Semantic Kernel + AutoGen; first-party connectors for Azure OpenAI, OpenAI, Anthropic, Amazon Bedrock, Google Gemini, Ollama
notes.langgraph: Version 1.1.x adds type-safe v2 API (streaming and invoke); Python 3.9 dropped; create_react_agent deprecated in favor of langchain.agents
notes.openai-agents-sdk: v0.14.1: SandboxAgent with persistent workspaces; openai v2.x required (breaking); Python 3.9 dropped; TypeScript at 0.8.3
notes.anthropic-claude-sdk: v0.1.60: extended thinking config (ThinkingConfigAdaptive/Enabled/Disabled), effort field for thinking depth, file checkpointing and session rewind; TypeScript at 0.2.110
notes.amazon-bedrock: Strands SDK 1.35.0; AgentCore with memory and policy controls; multi-agent graph workflows; A2A protocol support
notes.mistral: Major v2.0.1 rewrite — v1.x and v2.x APIs are not compatible; full Agents API, MCP tools, Code Interpreter, Premium Web Search
notes.pydantic-ai: v1.84.0 (April 16): fixes exponential-time regex in Google FileSearchTool; result_* API renamed to output_* (hard-removed); EvaluationReport, pydantic-graph, defer_loading, ThreadExecutor
notes.crewai: v1.14.0: checkpoint system added (SqliteProvider); CodeInterpreterTool removed; structured outputs with Pydantic; SSRF protections; native OpenAI-compatible providers (OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Ollama)
notes.autogen-ag2: v0.11.5; autogen.beta parallel redesign (event-driven); A2A protocol; QuickResearchTool; security fixes (CVE-2026-23745, CVE-2026-23950, CVE-2026-24842); formal v1.0 deprecation roadmap
notes.haystack-ai: v2.27.0: SearchableToolset, LLMRanker, PipelineTool, runtime tool injection, Jinja2 prompts, transformers v5; Python 3.9 dropped
notes.llamaindex: v0.14.20 Python; legacy agent classes hard-removed (FunctionCallingAgent, AgentRunner, ReActAgent, etc.); Python 3.9 dropped; AgentWorkflow is the primary pattern
